ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  "cmyk_code" TEXT /* CMYK code of the color */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of the color (e.g., primary, secondary, accent) */,
  "color_category" TEXT /* Category of the color (e.g., branding, product, marketing) */,
  "color_status" TEXT /* Status of the color (e.g., active, deprecated, approved) */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the color */,
  "is_fav" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the color is a favorite */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the color */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, administrator, marketing manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "palette_status" TEXT /* Status of the palette (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "palette_type" TEXT /* Type of the palette (e.g., project, product, marketing) */,
  "is_fav" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the palette is a favorite */,
  "palette_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the palette */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or product the palette is associated with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_colors" (
  "palette_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each palette-color relationship */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the color is primary in the palette */,
  "order_in_palette" INTEGER /* Order of the color within the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was added to the palette */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project or product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project or product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project or product */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., product, marketing, design) */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project or product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project or product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project or product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color usage */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or product where the color is used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., design, marketing, production) */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of where the color is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., old and new values) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (e.g., city, country) from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key string */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key expires */,
  "key_status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the API key was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the API key has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color version */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color in this version */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color in this version */,
  "cmyk_code" TEXT /* CMYK code of the color in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the version is approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_versions_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the user-role relationship (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
